query:
SELECT u.id,
                      u.email,
                      COUNT(DISTINCT r.movie_id) AS "total_movies!: i64",
                      AVG(CAST(r.rating AS REAL)) AS avg_rating
               FROM users u
               LEFT JOIN reviews r ON r.user_id = u.id
               GROUP BY u.id, u.email
               ORDER BY u.email ASC
